content.en:
The combat power of the Ninefold Origin Ancestor was also divided into multiple grades, and although Ye Tian was very strong now, it was much worse than the peak powerhouses of the Ninefold Origin Ancestor such as the Stone Chaos Dao Ancestor.

And the Nine-Fold Building has a place dedicated to testing the combat power of the Nine-Fold Ancestor, and that place is the Qi Blood Heavenly Tower.

The Qi Blood Heavenly Tower was sealed with a lot of extremely powerful Avatar-level Primordial Artifacts, and these Avatar-level artifacts had lost their minds, just like those ordinary Primordial Artifacts, they had completely lost their wisdom.

You only need to fight these Avatar-level Primordial Artifacts to verify your strength.

And the combat power of the Ninefold Ancestor can be divided into ladders.

For example, the Supreme Ninefold Ancestor is divided into five tiers, and the Ninefold Ancestor of the Stone Chaos Dao Ancestor is the Ninefold Ancestor of the first tier, the first tier is the strongest, the second tier is second, and the Ninefold Ancestor of the fifth tier is the weakest.

In addition, there is a list in the entire Silent Black Sea, which records the list of the first tier, the second tier, and the third tier, as for the fourth and fifth tiers, there are many ninefold ancestors, so there is no record, and they are not even eligible to be included in the list.

And the Stone Chaos Dao Ancestor of the Nine-Story Building ranked ninth on the list of the first tier of the Nine-Fold Origin Ancestor, which was already a terrifying ranking.

How the rankings are assessed, almost all rely on the performance results, as well as the deduction of those Supreme Nine Ancestors, so as to confirm their true strength.

Soon, Ye Tian came to the Qi Blood Heavenly Tower.

Here, Ye Tian saw the list of the first tier, the second tier, and the third tier, and as for the list of the Supreme Nine Ancestral Ancestors, he was not qualified to contact it.

"Seventy-three Ninefold Ancestors of the First Tier!"

"Three hundred and sixty-nine Ninefold Ancestors of the Second Tier!"

"There are more than one thousand and one thousand Ninefold Ancestors of the Third Tier!"

"There are too many Ninefold Ancestors!"

Ye Tian secretly exclaimed.

But if you think about it carefully, the Eightfold Origin Ancestor will occasionally fall, and even a big battle may cause countless Eightfold Origin Ancestors to fall, but it will be difficult for the Ninefold Origin Ancestor to fall.

Over the long years, the amount accumulated by the Ninefold Ancestor is definitely a lot.

For example, in the Nine-Fold Building, how many Ninefold Ancestors there were, he didn't know very well.

However, the only thing that really made countless Dao Ancestors awe was the seventy-three Ninefold Primordial Ancestors of the first rank, they were the strongest under the Strongest Ninefold Primordial Ancestors, their strength far exceeded that of ordinary Ninefold Primordial Ancestors, and they had the strength to kill ordinary Ninefold Primordial Ancestors in seconds.

At this time, the owner of the Qi Blood Heavenly Tower was the Ninefold Ancestor located on the first staircase, the Divine Blood Dao Ancestor!

Seeing that Ye Tian was coming, the Divine Blood Dao Ancestor briefly said the rules for breaking into the Qi Blood Heavenly Tower.

"Endless Dao Ancestor, Qi Blood Heavenly Tower is divided into five layers, each layer of time and space is sealed with extremely powerful Avatar-level Primordial Artifacts, they are difficult to kill, you only need to defeat them, and if you are determined by Qi Blood Heavenly Tower, you can enter the next layer, and you don't need to kill them. If we really kill them, we in the Ninth Floor will not be able to continue to capture so many Transformation-level Primordial Artifacts!" the Divine Blood Dao Ancestor reminded.

"Divine Blood Dao Ancestor, I understand!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Soon.

Ye Tian entered the first floor of the Qi Blood Heavenly Tower, where he saw a Avatar-level Primordial Antiquity, exuding a tyrannical aura all over his body.

This Avatar-level Primordial Antiquity is the weakest Avatar-level, and as long as it is defeated, it has the combat power of the Fifth Rank Ninefold Ancestor.

If you can't even defeat this avatar level, then it's really not even as good as the fifth rank.

And above the Silent Black Sea, there are really Ninefold Origin Ancestors who can't even enter the fifth tier, but the number of such Ninefold Origin Ancestors is extremely rare, and it is only a little more powerful than the top half-step Ninefold Origin Ancestor.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian only used one move, and directly exploded this avatar-level body, although the other party recovered quickly, Qi Blood Tianlou believed that Ye Tian had broken through the first layer.

So, he came to the second floor.

The second layer of the transformation level is more powerful, and it is still two at a time, as long as you defeat them, you will have the strength of the fourth rank of the Ninefold Ancestor.

"These two avatar levels are much more powerful than the first layer of avatar grades!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

As soon as they got into the fight, he felt the pressure.

He knew very well that even if he could defeat these two avatar levels, it would be impossible for him to break through the third layer.

After a while, Ye Tian finally defeated the two avatar levels, and then came to the third layer.

Sure enough.

At the third layer, he couldn't defeat the three-headed avatar level here at all, and he was defeated after a while.

"It seems that my strength can only rank in the fourth rank of the Ninefold Ancestral Ancestor!"

Ye Tian muttered.

This is also normal, after all, he has just broken through to the Ninefold Ancestor, and it is very difficult to cross to the third level all at once.

Most of the Ninefold Ancestors were only ranked at the fifth tier, and it was extremely difficult to advance to the fourth tier.

"I thought my strength could be ranked third!"

Ye Tian said with some emotion.

However, it won't be long before he can definitely step into the third tier.

After returning, Ye Tian began to plan his future cultivation path.

When you reach the Ninefold Origin Ancestor realm, there are many aspects that can be carried out if you want to quickly improve your strength.

For example, to improve the immeasurable will, to improve the cultivation, to improve the level of life, and to improve the immeasurable path.

At present, Ye Tian's immeasurable will and life level are no worse than those of the third and second tiers, but his weak point is the immeasurable dao.

Like the rudiments of the immeasurable path, the true immeasurable path is divided into initiation, small completion, great completion, and perfection.

And the entry-level Immeasurable Dao can only create ordinary Immeasurable Dao Control Techniques, and if you want to create a top-notch Immeasurable Dao Control Technique, you must have the Infinite Dao of the Xiaocheng realm.

In the past, he was limited to cultivation, and Ye Tian did not focus on contemplating the Immeasurable Dao, because it was too difficult and a waste of time to comprehend the Immeasurable Dao in the half-step Ninefold Origin Ancestor realm.

"You have to work hard to comprehend the immeasurable path!"

Ye Tian muttered.

And there are only two treasure places in the nine-story building that are suitable for contemplating the immeasurable path.

Infinite time and space, and infinite mountains!

These two places can accelerate the enlightenment of the immeasurable path, but not the others.

And even if it was a Ninefold Primordial Ancestor, it was impossible for him to permanently practice and contemplate enlightenment in the Infinite Time and Space and the Infinite Mountain, because the Infinite Time and Space and the Infinite Mountain were about to collapse.

If it weren't for the strict restrictions, these two treasures would probably not exist.

Therefore, if you want to enter these two places for long-term practice, you must meet certain requirements.

For example, the Ninefold Origin Ancestor of the Fifth Rank could only cultivate one trillion Origin Realm Era years in two treasure lands.

The Ninefold Origin Ancestor of the Fourth Ladder could only cultivate ten trillion Origin Domain Era years in two treasure lands.

And Ye Tian is now ranked in the fourth tier, so he has the time to cultivate ten trillion years of the Origin Domain Era.
